items.title: Womens Best Mom Ever T Shirt Funny Mama Gift Mothers Day Cute Life Saying Tees
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: best, mom, ever, mama, gift, mothers, day, cute, life, saying, tees. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
